## Driven by Both Technology R&D and Commercialization
![Industrial Grade Superconducting Quantum Products & Services](https://www.spinquanta.com/)
Industrial Grade Superconducting Quantum Products & Services
From QPUs and QPU EDA to quantum control & measurement systems, SPINQ offers a full-stack product ecosystem including superconducting quantum computers, algorithms, and software to provide customers with cost-effective modular units, integrated systems, and complete solutions, paving the way for industrial applications.
[Learn More](https://www.spinquanta.com/products/superconducting-quantum-products) [Ask to Buy](https://www.spinquanta.com/contact-us)
Educational Grade NMR Quantum Products & Services 
The SPINQ Education Grade NMR quantum computer series is based on the principles of nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) quantum computing. Currently, various models, including experimental, desktop, and portable versions, have been launched. These products are characterized by low cost, maintenance-free operation, and high stability, offering a complete set of products and services for quantum computing research and teaching.
[Learn More](https://www.spinquanta.com/products/nmr-quantum-products) [Ask to Buy](https://www.spinquanta.com/contact-us)
![](https://www.spinquanta.com/)
![](https://www.spinquanta.com/)
Quantum Computing Cloud Platform & Software 
It includes a cloud service platform and related software linking to a variety of real quantum computing systems, in which the cloud platform supports graphical quantum line design and online QASM programming, as well as user-defined quantum gates and a variety of built-in typical quantum algorithms, to meet the different needs of scientific research, education and enthusiasts.
[Learn More](https://www.spinquanta.com/products/quantum-computing-software) [Contact Us](https://www.spinquanta.com/contact-us)
Co-building Scenario-based Solutions With Partners 
Quantum Education Solution
Fintech-based Solution
Biomedical-based Solution
AI-based Solution
Quantum Education Solution
We provide comprehensive and cutting-edge quantum education solutions tailored for universities, K12 education, and various science popularization scenarios. By combining in-depth theoretical teaching with practical exercises, we offer customized classroom setups, professional teaching teams, and educational quantum computing equipment to help teachers and students master essential future skills in quantum computing.
[Learn More](https://www.spinquanta.com/quantum-computing-solutions/education)

These activities show SpinQ’s devotion to popularizing classroom-based quantum education and cultivating emerging quantum talents. ](https://www.spinquanta.com/news-detail/spinq-quantum-computing-products-showcased-in-europe-and-southeast-asia20260605)[![SpinQ and Hubei University Joint Quantum Algorithm Research Published in Quantum
Information Processing](https://www.spinquanta.com/) SpinQ and Hubei University Joint Quantum Algorithm Research Published in Quantum Information Processing 2026.05.26 SpinQ and Hubei University jointly developed a new noise‑resilient quantum algorithm (WQTE), which was published in the international journal Quantum Information Processing.  ](https://www.spinquanta.com/news-detail/spinq-and-hubei-university-joint-quantum-algorithm-research-published-in-quantum-information-processing20260525)[![SpinQ and HKUST Joint Research on Quantum Error Correction Accepted by QEC 2026](https://www.spinquanta.com/) SpinQ and HKUST Joint Research on Quantum Error Correction Accepted by QEC 2026 2026.04.23 SpinQ and HKUST’s joint research on a bidirectional decoding algorithm for concatenated quantum Hamming codes was accepted by QEC 2026. It achieves near‑optimal effective distance, and enables more efficient fault‑tolerant quantum computing. ](https://www.spinquanta.com/news-detail/spinq-and-hkust-joint-research-on-quantum-error-correction20260423)
[![Chinese quantum chip startup SpinQ raises $87.2m series C+](https://www.spinquanta.com/) Chinese quantum chip startup SpinQ raises $87.2m series C+ 2026.04.07 SpinQ Technology said it raised 600 million yuan (US$87.2 million) in a series C+ round to fund research on next-generation, high-qubit superconducting quantum chips and expand standardized production lines. ](https://www.techinasia.com/news/chinese-quantum-chip-startup-spinq-raises-872m-series)[![SpinQ Secures $92M Series C+ Funding](https://www.spinquanta.com/) SpinQ Secures $92M Series C+ Funding 2026.04.06 SpinQ has secured nearly 1 billion yuan in funding over the last three months, completing a Series C+ round of 600 million yuan combined with the Series C round completed three months prior.  ](https://quantumzeitgeist.com/spinq-series-funding-completes-raising/)[![SpinQ Raises Nearly 1B CNY Series C to Scale Superconducting & NMR Hardware](https://www.spinquanta.com/) SpinQ Raises Nearly 1B CNY Series C to Scale Superconducting & NMR Hardware 2026.04.06 SpinQ Technology raised 600 million yuan — about $83 million USD — in a Series C+ round, bringing its total Series C funding to nearly 1 billion yuan in three months to accelerate development of scalable quantum computing systems. ](https://thequantuminsider.com/2026/04/03/spinq-technology-secures-nearly-1-billion-chinese-yuan-in-series-c-funding-to-scale-industrial-superconducting-quantum-computing/)

The first company in the world to achieve quantum computing product

coverage across all five continents.

Committed to the industrialization of quantum computing,

providing one-stop quantum computing solutions for a wide range of industries

The first company in the world to achieve quantum computing product

coverage across all five continents.

Driven by Both Technology R&D and Commercialization

Industrial Grade Superconducting Quantum Products & Services

From QPUs and QPU EDA to quantum control & measurement systems, SPINQ offers a full-stack product ecosystem including superconducting quantum computers, algorithms, and software to provide customers with cost-effective modular units, integrated systems, and complete solutions, paving the way for industrial applications.

Educational Grade NMR Quantum Products & Services

The SPINQ Education Grade NMR quantum computer series is based on the principles of nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) quantum computing. Currently, various models, including experimental, desktop, and portable versions, have been launched. These products are characterized by low cost, maintenance-free operation, and high stability, offering a complete set of products and services for quantum computing research and teaching.

Quantum Computing Cloud Platform & Software

It includes a cloud service platform and related software linking to a variety of real quantum computing systems, in which the cloud platform supports graphical quantum line design and online QASM programming, as well as user-defined quantum gates and a variety of built-in typical quantum algorithms, to meet the different needs of scientific research, education and enthusiasts.

Co-building Scenario-based Solutions With Partners

Quantum Education Solution

Fintech-based Solution

Biomedical-based Solution

AI-based Solution

Quantum Education Solution

We provide comprehensive and cutting-edge quantum education solutions tailored for universities, K12 education, and various science popularization scenarios. By combining in-depth theoretical teaching with practical exercises, we offer customized classroom setups, professional teaching teams, and educational quantum computing equipment to help teachers and students master essential future skills in quantum computing.

Press Release
Media Coverage
Learn more >
SpinQ Quantum Computing Products Showcased in Europe and Southeast Asia
2026.06.05
SpinQ displayed its quantum computing products at academic events in Europe and Southeast Asia. These activities show SpinQ’s devotion to popularizing classroom-based quantum education and cultivating emerging quantum talents.
SpinQ and Hubei University Joint Quantum Algorithm Research Published in Quantum Information Processing
2026.05.26
SpinQ and Hubei University jointly developed a new noise‑resilient quantum algorithm (WQTE), which was published in the international journal Quantum Information Processing.
SpinQ and HKUST Joint Research on Quantum Error Correction Accepted by QEC 2026
2026.04.23
SpinQ and HKUST’s joint research on a bidirectional decoding algorithm for concatenated quantum Hamming codes was accepted by QEC 2026. It achieves near‑optimal effective distance, and enables more efficient fault‑tolerant quantum computing.
Chinese quantum chip startup SpinQ raises $87.2m series C+
2026.04.07
SpinQ Technology said it raised 600 million yuan (US$87.2 million) in a series C+ round to fund research on next-generation, high-qubit superconducting quantum chips and expand standardized production lines.
SpinQ Secures $92M Series C+ Funding
2026.04.06
SpinQ has secured nearly 1 billion yuan in funding over the last three months, completing a Series C+ round of 600 million yuan combined with the Series C round completed three months prior.
SpinQ Raises Nearly 1B CNY Series C to Scale Superconducting & NMR Hardware
2026.04.06
SpinQ Technology raised 600 million yuan — about $83 million USD — in a Series C+ round, bringing its total Series C funding to nearly 1 billion yuan in three months to accelerate development of scalable quantum computing systems.
